title: Goodluck 25 Pack Gold Glitter Plastic Bowls,340ml/12oz Reusable Soup Bowls, Heavy Duty Dessert Bowls for Weddings, Parties, Dinners, Catering, Thanksgiving and Everyday Use
features: Elegant Appearance: The glitter gold plastic bowls have a glossy finish and are suitable for pairing with gold tableware. Each small bowl features a wide rim, making it easy to handle without the risk of burns. Whether at a lavish party or a cozy family dinner, they add sophistication and refinement to the table.

Perfect Size: This set of 25 plastic bowls, holding 340ml/12 ounces, is perfect for serving salads, hot soups, candies, desserts, yogurt parfaits, fruits, ice cream, cake, breakfast cereals, and more,providing your guests with a convenient experience.

Safe Material & Time Saving: Soup bowls are made from food-grade, reusable plastic that is BPA-free,ensuring they are resistant to bending or breaking.Compared to easily breakable glass and ceramic, plastic soup bowls offer peace of mind and convenience.

Great for Any Occasion: These white serving bowls are perfect for any party and everyday use, including weddings, birthdays, parties, baby showers, business gatherings, family reunions, dinners, holidays, Thanksgiving, Halloween, and catering events. Make entertaining a breeze today!

Hand Wash Only: Goodluck plastic bowls feature a gold foil stamping process. To ensure the bowls' gold rims remain intact, we recommend hand washing. Washing them in the dishwasher may damage the rims, affecting their appearance.
